name: Chris S.
text: Jerry was great. Very flexible, communicative and responsive to all questions. Went out of his way to drop the vehicle off. Will definitely recommend him to others.

name: David
text: Jerry was very polite and answered all my questions. I appreciate him not being pushy at all as well.

name: Ken
text: I bought an Audi Q5 for my mom from Jerry at Maxim Autos and couldn't be happier. No hidden fees, no pressure, very honest. The car is great — will definitely come back.

name: Kathi Cuevas
text: Maxim Autos is the best car dealership I have worked with. Jerry is kind, honest and trustworthy. He handles every aspect of the buying process. If you're looking for a car, start your search at Maxim Autos.

name: Jim
text: Hands down the most honest and straightforward car buying experience I've ever had. Totally pressure-free, prices set clearly, and he issued my plates on the spot — no trip to the DMV needed. Highly recommended.

name: Zoey Ph.
text: Smooth, straightforward experience with Jerry. He was so patient and not pushy, transparent about pricing and history. The process was quick. Overall, great customer service and fair pricing.
